calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-02-2012 Off Calendar

Application For Entry Of Judgment And Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Of Judgment For Quiet Title And Declaratory Relief
Off Calendar Jul-31-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing Quieting Title Real Property.
Dept. 514, Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.
James Straw, Esq. for the plaintiff St. Anthony Foundation, a California Non-Profit Corp.
Plaintiff's Witness Linda Pasquinucci and Benjamin B. Ron were placed under oath and testifies.
Default of Defendant All Persons has been duly entered.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant for quiet title and declaratory relief (see scanned doc for details of the judgment.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-04-2012 Continued To Oct-17-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-16-2012 Continued To May-18-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610
